title: Leetcode 223. Rectangle Area
shortDescription: Given coordinates of two axis-aligned rectangles, compute the total area covered by both. The key is to sum their individual areas and subtract the area of their intersection (zero if they don't overlap).

Were You Asked This?
Leetcode 223. Rectangle Area

Given coordinates of two axis-aligned rectangles, compute the total area covered by both. The key is to sum their individual areas and subtract the area of their intersection (zero if they don't overlap).

Google
